dailyreward.name: Daily Reward
dailyreward.short: Lets players claim a once-per-day starter reward

homesystem.name: Home System
homesystem.short: Simple sethome, home, and delhome commands

tparequests.name: TPA Requests
tparequests.short: Adds player teleport requests with accept and deny

starterkit.name: Starter Kit
starterkit.short: Gives new players a balanced one-time kit

autocleanup.name: Auto Cleanup
autocleanup.short: Removes dropped items on a timer to reduce lag

motdplus.name: MOTD Plus
motdplus.short: Sends a clean welcome message and tip to players

voterewards.name: Vote Rewards
voterewards.short: Lets players claim periodic vote-style rewards

playtimetracker.name: Playtime Tracker
playtimetracker.short: Tracks total playtime and shows it with a command

afkmanager.name: AFK Manager
afkmanager.short: Automatically marks inactive players as AFK

warpsystem.name: Warp System
warpsystem.short: Creates and manages public warps with commands
